problem.summary: Route tokens to their top-2 experts from router logits and scatter token ids into per-expert capacity slots. The baseline uses one thread per token, serial expert scan, and atomic scatter. The optimized scaffold uses one block per token with thread-local expert scans and a block-local top-2 merge before the two atomic scatters.
constraints: top-2 experts are sorted by descending logit with lower expert id winning ties
softmax weights are computed over the selected top-2 logits only
overflow slots are dropped after route_indices and route_weights are written
expert_counts must be initialized by the caller

verification.method: TODO: compare route_indices and route_weights against a CPU top-2 router; validate expert slot contents after deterministic single-stream launches.

curation.notes: Template-only MoE routing scaffold. hipCUB/rocPRIM/hipCUB/rocThrust block primitives, vLLM on ROCm, and vLLM are reference paths for stronger routing, sorting, and serving integration before claiming a custom routing win.
